revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:阿曇氏, en:Azumi people); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96545018 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿曇氏 | revid=96545018 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=安曇族|date1=2007年12月20日 }} == 改名提案 ==
[[:Category:日本の氏族]]に登録されている氏族のほとんどが、「○○氏」となっています。安曇族だけに特異な事情があればやむ終えないですが、特にそのような事情が無ければ、安曇氏に改名したいと思います。--[[利用者:カイの迷宮|カイの迷宮]] 2008年8月16日 (土) 16:22 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名に賛成 ==
安曇族のことを「安曇氏」とか「阿曇氏」というので、改名した方がいいと思われます。もともとは、「阿曇」であったため、'''阿曇氏'''とするのが良いでしょう。記事の中に「'''安曇族'''、'''阿曇族'''ともいう。」などと付け加えると良いと思います。--[[利用者:Uenokami|Uenokami]] 2008年8月19日 (火) 12:50 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名 ==
安曇族の記事は、阿曇氏に改名した。--[[利用者:Uenokami|Uenokami]] 2008年8月24日 (日) 04:17 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199262715 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Azumi people | revid=1199262715 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|history=y}} {{WikiProject Ethnic groups|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Japan}}
{{Educational assignment}}
{{Translated|ja|阿曇氏}}
== Azumi-zoku vs Agumo ==
Though I can puzzle out that the kanji given could be pronounced as either 'azumi-zoku' or 'agumo', the title of the page (azumi-zoku) is not contained in the article at all. Needs more explanation. [[User:LordAmeth|LordAmeth]] 11:53, 28 March 2006 (UTC)
:I looked through the previous edits, and the one that changed the "Azumi-zoku" back to "Agumo" gave no explanation, so I reverted it. --[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]] 08:07, 29 March 2006 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Removed Stub Status ==
As part of an educational assignment, I've added around 2000 words to the article, an infobox, a navbox and a lot more references. In doing so, I've also removed the stub status. [[User:BlackBerryBliss|BlackBerryBliss]] ([[User talk:BlackBerryBliss|talk]]) 04:56, 24 May 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96545018 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿曇氏 | revid=96545018 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=安曇族|date1=2007年12月20日 }} == 改名提案 ==
[[:Category:日本の氏族]]に登録されている氏族のほとんどが、「○○氏」となっています。安曇族だけに特異な事情があればやむ終えないですが、特にそのような事情が無ければ、安曇氏に改名したいと思います。--[[User:カイの迷宮|カイの迷宮]] 2008年8月16日 (土) 16:22 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名に賛成 ==
安曇族のことを「安曇氏」とか「阿曇氏」というので、改名した方がいいと思われます。もともとは、「阿曇」であったため、'''阿曇氏'''とするのが良いでしょう。記事の中に「'''安曇族'''、'''阿曇族'''ともいう。」などと付け加えると良いと思います。--[[User:Uenokami|Uenokami]] 2008年8月19日 (火) 12:50 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名 ==
安曇族の記事は、阿曇氏に改名した。--[[User:Uenokami|Uenokami]] 2008年8月24日 (日) 04:17 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199262715 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Azumi people | revid=1199262715 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|history=y}} {{WikiProject Ethnic groups|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Japan}}
{{Educational assignment}}
{{Translated|ja|阿曇氏}}
== Azumi-zoku vs Agumo ==
Though I can puzzle out that the kanji given could be pronounced as either 'azumi-zoku' or 'agumo', the title of the page (azumi-zoku) is not contained in the article at all. Needs more explanation. [[User:LordAmeth|LordAmeth]] 11:53, 28 March 2006 (UTC)
:I looked through the previous edits, and the one that changed the "Azumi-zoku" back to "Agumo" gave no explanation, so I reverted it. --[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]] 08:07, 29 March 2006 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Removed Stub Status ==
As part of an educational assignment, I've added around 2000 words to the article, an infobox, a navbox and a lot more references. In doing so, I've also removed the stub status. [[User:BlackBerryBliss|BlackBerryBliss]] ([[User talk:BlackBerryBliss|talk]]) 04:56, 24 May 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>SombraCollar]], [[User:Immanuelle]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Azumi_people here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Azumi_people for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96545018 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿曇氏 | revid=96545018 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=安曇族|date1=2007年12月20日 }} == 改名提案 ==
[[:Category:日本の氏族]]に登録されている氏族のほとんどが、「○○氏」となっています。安曇族だけに特異な事情があればやむ終えないですが、特にそのような事情が無ければ、安曇氏に改名したいと思います。--[[User:カイの迷宮|カイの迷宮]] 2008年8月16日 (土) 16:22 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名に賛成 ==
安曇族のことを「安曇氏」とか「阿曇氏」というので、改名した方がいいと思われます。もともとは、「阿曇」であったため、'''阿曇氏'''とするのが良いでしょう。記事の中に「'''安曇族'''、'''阿曇族'''ともいう。」などと付け加えると良いと思います。--[[User:Uenokami|Uenokami]] 2008年8月19日 (火) 12:50 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 改名 ==
安曇族の記事は、阿曇氏に改名した。--[[User:Uenokami|Uenokami]] 2008年8月24日 (日) 04:17 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199262715 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Azumi people | revid=1199262715 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|history=y}} {{WikiProject Ethnic groups|importance=mid}} }} {{Image requested|in=Japan}}
{{Educational assignment}}
{{Translated|ja|阿曇氏}}
== Azumi-zoku vs Agumo ==
Though I can puzzle out that the kanji given could be pronounced as either 'azumi-zoku' or 'agumo', the title of the page (azumi-zoku) is not contained in the article at all. Needs more explanation. [[User:LordAmeth|LordAmeth]] 11:53, 28 March 2006 (UTC)
:I looked through the previous edits, and the one that changed the "Azumi-zoku" back to "Agumo" gave no explanation, so I reverted it. --[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]] 08:07, 29 March 2006 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Removed Stub Status ==
As part of an educational assignment, I've added around 2000 words to the article, an infobox, a navbox and a lot more references. In doing so, I've also removed the stub status. [[User:BlackBerryBliss|BlackBerryBliss]] ([[User talk:BlackBerryBliss|talk]]) 04:56, 24 May 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
